query:
INSERT INTO intakeResponses (organizationId, questionId, response, updatedBy, updatedAt) VALUES 
(990001, 'IW.orders_description', 'Orders originate in Altera Paragon and route as HL7 ORM via Corepoint → DataFirst/Silverback → New Lantern. New / cancel / reschedule order types unblocked and in testing (wk of 6/2); STAT/stroke prioritization being validated with dedicated ER/inpatient test orders. ORC-1=NW with missing ORC-5 is treated as a scheduled order for prefetch (transform implemented). Open: Paragon ORM filing errors from invalid patient account/visit numbers, being corrected upstream by RMC IT. Test routing PV1.11 _RMCA_TEST (port 7080) / prod RMCA (7081).', 'notion-sync@system', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE response = VALUES(response), updatedBy = VALUES(updatedBy), updatedAt = VALUES(updatedAt)
